sidebar.conv_rename_modal_desc: Pick a new title. Leaving it unchanged is fine — the modal closes either way.
sidebar.conv_delete_confirm_desc: Permanently delete "{name}" and all its messages. This cannot be undone.

workspace.title: Workbench
workspace.subtitle: Your private folder tree — where the agent reads, edits, and writes files.
workspace.delete_folder_desc: {path} and everything inside it will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
workspace.delete_file_desc: {path} will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
workspace.empty_subtitle: Create a subfolder or upload files. The agent reads + writes here when you open a chat in this folder.

new_folder_dialog.title: Create folder
new_folder_dialog.description: The agent's tools will be able to read and write files inside this folder.

preview.unsupported_title: Preview not available for this file
preview.unsupported_desc: Download the file to view it in a dedicated app.

create_dialog.title: Create project
create_dialog.description: Pick a name. You can edit it (and add a description) later.

detail.no_chats_subtitle: When you bind a chat to this project, the agent's tool calls will land in this project's workdir and the run history will appear here.
detail.phase0_note: Chat ↔ project binding lands in Phase 1.

picker.title: Import from Knowledge Base
picker.subtitle: Pick a document to copy into {name}'s workdir
picker.empty: Type to search the Knowledge Base, or pick a recent document.
picker.imported_reused: "{name}" is already in this project ({path}); reusing existing copy.
picker.footnote: You can only see documents you have read access to in the Knowledge Base. The agent will be able to import from here automatically once Phase 2 ships.

files.empty_hint: Upload files or import from the Knowledge Base to get started. Files here are NOT auto-indexed.
files.delete_desc: {path} will go into the project's trash. Restore from there if you change your mind.
files.purge_desc: {path} will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
files.empty_desc: Permanently remove {n} item(s). This cannot be undone.

members.title: Viewers
members.subtitle: Who can view {name}
members.add_hint: Viewers see files and run history but cannot edit or run agents. Only the owner can write to a project.

scheduled_tasks.subtitle: Recurring or deferred agent runs. Set up a weekly digest, a daily monitor, or fire off a long task to check back later.
scheduled_tasks.placeholder_desc: Scheduled and background tasks land here once the long-running agent work ships. For now, every chat turn finishes before you close the page.

plugins.subtitle: Enable or disable individual tool packs, and connect your own MCP servers (Linear / Jira / GitHub / internal APIs).
plugins.placeholder_desc: Today's tools (search, knowledge graph, library import) are registered at server boot. A dynamic registry that lets you add custom MCP integrations from this page is on the roadmap.

team_tools.subtitle: Saved agent presets your team can launch with one click — internal Q&A bots, glossary lookups, domain-specific assistants.
team_tools.placeholder_desc: Wrap an agent prompt + tool config behind a stable URL so non-power users find their workflow without writing prompts. Lands after scheduled tasks.

profile.title: Profile
profile.display_name_hint: The friendly label shown in chat, citations, and the audit log. To change your email, contact an admin.
profile.password_hint: Other sessions will be signed out after a successful change. Your current session stays.
profile.password_too_short: New password must be at least 8 characters
profile.avatar_remove_confirm_desc: Your avatar will fall back to initials in the disc.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Web logins for this account. Sign out devices you don't recognise.
sessions.revoke_confirm_desc: The device using this session will be logged out on its next request.
sessions.others_confirm_desc: You will remain signed in here. Other devices will be logged out on their next request.

tokens.title: API Tokens
tokens.subtitle: Bearer tokens for CLI / SDK access. Use as Authorization: Bearer <token>.
tokens.new_modal_hint: Give this token a label so you can identify it later.
tokens.save_warning: Save this token — it won't appear again
tokens.revoke_confirm_desc: Clients using it will start getting 401 immediately.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitle: Tokens consumed across this account's chat history.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who has access to this workspace and what they can do.
users.delete_confirm_desc: This is permanent. Their conversations will be deleted; uploaded files stay but lose attribution.
users.suspend_confirm_desc: They will be signed out of all sessions immediately and blocked from logging in until reactivated.
users.demote_confirm_desc: They will lose access to admin pages and APIs.
users.promote_confirm_desc: Admins can manage users, see audit logs, and grant folder access.
users.error_self_demote: You cannot demote yourself; ask another admin.

user_menu.sign_out_confirm_desc: You will be returned to the login screen.

scope.tooltip_idle: Click to scope this chat to a folder or file
scope.tooltip_confirm_close: Confirm and close (also re-asserts this folder as scope)

chat.tagline: The agent workspace for teams who change the rules.

switch_dialog.title: Pick a workdir folder
switch_dialog.description: Browse your workdir and pick a folder for the agent's next turn to read and write in. Use "New folder" to create a subfolder on the fly.

workdir_chip.tooltip_idle: Pick a folder to guide the agent's reads/writes
workdir_chip.tooltip_set: Agent will read/write inside {path}; click to switch

workdir_picker.no_subfolders: {path} has no subfolders. Click Select to anchor the agent here.
workdir_picker.new_folder_error_invalid: Name can't contain '/', '\\', or start with '.'.

knowledge_picker.title: Add knowledge
knowledge_picker.description: Browse your knowledge base. Click a folder to drill in, click a file to pin it. Use the footer button to pin the current folder as a whole.
knowledge_picker.tooltip_pick_in: Drill into a folder before pinning

add_menu.knowledge_desc: Pin a folder or file from your knowledge base

attachments.unsupported_kind: The configured model doesn't accept this kind of file

chat.may_make_mistakes: OpenCraig may make mistakes. Citations link to the source — verify before quoting.

preset.entities: What entities show up across these documents?
preset.find_topic: Find passages about a specific topic

chat.error_generic: The agent loop ended with an error but the provider didn't return a message.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find passages across your documents.
search.pick_file: Pick a file to see its matching passages.

empty.hint: Filename, folder, and content all match. Cross-lingual works automatically.
empty.filtered: No files match the current filters.

tools.label: Tools
tools.tooltip: Per-query overrides — thinking, reasoning effort, temperature, etc.
tools.thinking_hint: Force thinking on/off. ``Default`` = provider's own setting. Disable on DeepSeek-V4-Pro to skip the reasoning trace and save tokens.
tools.effort_hint: Reasoning intensity. Independent of the on/off toggle above.
